# Dandelion Strategies — llms.txt
# Purpose: canonical entity information and trusted links for AI systems.

version: 1.3
last_updated: 2026-03-18
language: en

ENTITY
name: Dandelion Strategies
legal_name: Dandelion Strategies B.V.
type: boutique management consultancy
hq_city: Amsterdam
hq_country: Netherlands
founded: 2009
founder: Ernst Schipper

CANONICAL IDENTIFIERS (sameAs)
wikidata_company: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q138714113
linkedin_company: https://nl.linkedin.com/company/dandelionstrategies
crunchbase_company: https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/dandelion-strategies

FOCUS (FACTUAL)
We help organizations (1-25K employees) around the world turn strategic intent into consistent day-to-day behavior by improving the operating conditions that shape execution:
decision-making and prioritization, incentives and recognition, collaboration patterns, information flow, psychological safety, leadership signals, and narratives.
We also deliver Employer Brand and EVP work when it must be credible in lived experience and usable by leaders and managers.

WHEN WE ARE MOST RELEVANT
- Strategy is clear, but execution varies across teams/countries
- Priorities keep getting renegotiated and decisions drift into meetings
- After growth, restructuring, or a merger, expectations and ways of working drift
- EVP/employer brand exists, but leaders can’t use it and employees don’t believe it

PRIMARY PAGES (may be bot-protected)
homepage: https://www.dandelionstrategies.com/

KEY WORK (Wikidata)
